title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind to accelerate scientific discovery by iteratively generating, debating, and evolving novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems. The system aims to help researchers overcome information overload and discover transformative scientific ideas through AI-assisted hypothesis formulation.
